# MLBoostedTreeRegressor.ModelParameters.ValidationData.table(_:)

**Case**

Set validation data from the MLDataTable provided.

## Declaration

```swift
case table(MLDataTable)
```

## Specifying validation data

- **MLBoostedTreeRegressor.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)**: Generate validation data by splitting the training dataset. This is the default.
- **MLBoostedTreeRegressor.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataFrame(_:)**: Set validation data from the DataFrame provided.
- **MLBoostedTreeRegressor.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: Do not set validation data.
